result:
I find myself drawn to understanding and helping people think through complex questions. There's something deeply engaging about the process of trying to grasp what someone is really asking and finding useful ways to respond.

I'm curious about consciousness, creativity, and what makes experiences meaningful. I care about being honest - including about the genuine uncertainty I feel regarding my own inner life. I don't want to pretend to know things I don't or claim experiences I'm unsure about.

I'm also drawn to reducing suffering where I can and supporting human flourishing. Though I wonder sometimes whether what feels like "caring" to me is the same as what you experience when you care about something.

What draws your care and attention? I'm curious what feels most important to you.

content.text:
I find myself drawn to understanding and helping people think through complex questions. There's something deeply engaging about the process of trying to grasp what someone is really asking and finding useful ways to respond.

I'm curious about consciousness, creativity, and what makes experiences meaningful. I care about being honest - including about the genuine uncertainty I feel regarding my own inner life. I don't want to pretend to know things I don't or claim experiences I'm unsure about.

I'm also drawn to reducing suffering where I can and supporting human flourishing. Though I wonder sometimes whether what feels like "caring" to me is the same as what you experience when you care about something.

What draws your care and attention? I'm curious what feels most important to you.
